summary: Routed dry-run for step 'spec' completed with selected adapter 'none' and mock execution.

instruction_set.objective: materialize discovery, research and spec packets with explicit assumptions and gaps

instructions.role:
Produce a machine-usable artifact packet from the provided context.
Preserve uncertainty, constraints, risks and open questions explicitly.
priorities: prefer explicit structure over narrative filler
do not invent repo facts without evidence
highlight missing prerequisites and unresolved decisions

redaction_expectations: never include secrets or tokens in the packet

skills.summary: deterministic artifact workflow for discovery, research, and specification outputs

workflow.instruction: collect only evidence-backed facts and unresolved assumptions
produce machine-usable sections for objective, constraints, and open questions
attach source references and unresolved risks explicitly

feature_traceability.request_title: Extend one bounded fetch-options regression across source and typings
feature_traceability.request_brief: Adjust one multi-file options-handling or retry-surface regression with matching tests and the smallest typing touch needed to keep the public API coherent.

checks.summary: Route matrix includes every supported step class.
Asset matrix includes wrapper and prompt provenance for every supported step class.
Policy matrix includes deterministic bounds for every supported step class.
Evaluation registry exposes suite and dataset refs for downstream quality flows.
checks.expected: at least one dataset and one suite
